---
title: "App Library"
---

# Shinylive App Placeholders

These app skeletons are designed to be embedded in slides and expanded later.

- `bias_variance_demo`: show error decomposition intuition
- `regularization_path_demo`: compare ridge and lasso coefficient shrinkage
- `tree_split_demo`: visualize recursive partitioning
- `metrics_threshold_demo`: threshold effects on confusion matrix metrics
- `class_imbalance_demo`: prevalence effects and evaluation pitfalls
- `shap_intuition_demo`: local and global feature contribution intuition

## Source locations

- [bias_variance_demo/app.R](bias_variance_demo/app.R)
- [regularization_path_demo/app.R](regularization_path_demo/app.R)
- [tree_split_demo/app.R](tree_split_demo/app.R)
- [metrics_threshold_demo/app.R](metrics_threshold_demo/app.R)
- [class_imbalance_demo/app.R](class_imbalance_demo/app.R)
- [shap_intuition_demo/app.R](shap_intuition_demo/app.R)
